title: find_free_id TOCTOU gap not documented
description: find_free_id calls nvm_list to snapshot used IDs, picks the first free slot, then returns it. Between nvm_list and the subsequent nvm_add in put(), another concurrent client with the same client_id can grab that slot, causing nvm_add to fail with SecretError::Backend. The gap is inherent to wolfHSM (no atomic find-or-allocate API), but there is no comment explaining this. A future contributor might add blind retry logic that hides the root cause. Add a comment in find_free_id and put() explaining the TOCTOU gap and that the caller should propagate the Backend error rather than retrying.
